title: genista triacanthos var. juniperina
intro: Genista triacanthos var. juniperina, also known as the Rocky Mountain juniper spiny broom or commonly referred to as the spiny broom or scrub broom, is a shrubby perennial plant with a spiny stem and yellow flowers. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Genista triacanthos var. juniperina include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate joint pain and inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
